tasks.title: Add workflow-safe gate readiness and artifact evidence types

metadata.contract_refs_summary: implements AC1 AC2 AC5; verifies AC5; respects workflow bundle boundary constraints

tasks.verification: Completed workflow-safe gate readiness and artifact evidence model. Checkpoint commit b3d48fa5c1c4616c98b411c0bc6e242b41d5c859.
tasks.summary: Added gate artifact kind/evidence and readiness blocker schemas/types in `plugin/src/types/gates.ts` and exports in `plugin/src/types/index.ts`. Added workflow-safe `plugin/src/temporal/gate-readiness.ts` with artifact-backed gate map, deterministic prior-gate blockers, artifact-store blockers, acceptance contract blockers, and explicit compatibility evidence. Added tests covering artifact map, prior gate blocker, missing artifact store, compatibility rationale, missing acceptance contract, and evidence parsing.

tasks.title: Add artifact inspection and acceptance artifact activity support

metadata.contract_refs_summary: implements AC1 AC3 AC4 AC6; verifies AC3 AC6

tasks.verification: Completed artifact inspection and acceptance artifact activity support. Checkpoint commit 01d07aeddc5110d17d5403f559b555f2c3455af5.
tasks.summary: Extended Temporal artifact activity support with `acceptance.md` in `ArtifactKind` and artifact filename map. Added `inspectArtifactActivity` that reads artifact content in activity context, returns path/contentHash/nonWhitespaceChars/checkedAt metadata, and structured missing/unreadable errors without returning content. Added tests for acceptance read/write support, valid metadata, blank metadata, and missing errors.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended Temporal artifact activity support with `acceptance.md` in `ArtifactKind` and artifact filename map. Added `inspectArtifactActivity` that reads artifact content in activity context, returns path/contentHash/nonWhitespaceChars/checkedAt metadata, and structured missing/unreadable errors without returning content. Added tests for acceptance read/write support, valid metadata, blank metadata, and missing errors.

tasks.title: Guard gateCompletedSignal with workflow-level artifact readiness

metadata.contract_refs_summary: implements AC1 AC2 AC3 AC5 AC6; verifies AC1 AC2 AC3 AC5 AC6; respects signal-only and workflow-determinism constraints

tasks.verification: Completed workflow-level guard for gateCompletedSignal. Checkpoint commit 877d2b233873d04ea1037cca95d7b43e5e381a0e.
tasks.summary: Changed `gateCompletedSignal` handling from direct synchronous mutation to guarded async workflow completion. The handler now serializes completion attempts, evaluates workflow-owned readiness, validates required artifacts via `inspectArtifactActivity`, marks gates stuck with deterministic blocker codes when readiness/artifacts fail, and records artifact evidence on success. Added async-safe handler rejection normalization and preserved projection/search-attribute updates. Carried `projectionChangesDir` into workflow state and made `lastSignalAt` monotonic for async signal ordering. Updated legacy tests to use explicit compatibility reasons where no artifact store is present and added direct-signal tests for missing artifact, valid artifact evidence, and prior-gate sequence blocking.
tasks.implementation_summary: Changed `gateCompletedSignal` handling from direct synchronous mutation to guarded async workflow completion. The handler now serializes completion attempts, evaluates workflow-owned readiness, validates required artifacts via `inspectArtifactActivity`, marks gates stuck with deterministic blocker codes when readiness/artifacts fail, and records artifact evidence on success. Added async-safe handler rejection normalization and preserved projection/search-attribute updates. Carried `projectionChangesDir` into workflow state and made `lastSignalAt` monotonic for async signal ordering. Updated legacy tests to use explicit compatibility reasons where no artifact store is present and added direct-signal tests for missing artifact, valid artifact evidence, and prior-gate sequence blocking.

tasks.title: Generate acceptance.md from typed contract review proof

metadata.contract_refs_summary: implements AC4 AC6; verifies AC4 AC6; respects no-manual-acceptance-proof avoidance

tasks.verification: Generated acceptance.md from typed ChangeContract review proof during acceptance gate completion; added workflow readiness blockers for missing/failing required review rows; verified focused workflow/readiness tests and package check.
tasks.summary: Added renderAcceptanceProjection(state) in workflow-safe gate-readiness module, using ChangeContract.reviewMatrix as the source of truth. Acceptance gate completion now writes acceptance.md via writeArtifactActivity before inspecting the acceptance artifact and recording artifact evidence. Gate readiness now blocks required contract items with missing rows or unresolved statuses (fail/violated/unknown). Added RED/GREEN tests for missing review rows, failing rows, and generated acceptance.md artifact evidence. Also formatted files previously reported by Prettier so pnpm run check passes.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added renderAcceptanceProjection(state) in workflow-safe gate-readiness module, using ChangeContract.reviewMatrix as the source of truth. Acceptance gate completion now writes acceptance.md via writeArtifactActivity before inspecting the acceptance artifact and recording artifact evidence. Gate readiness now blocks required contract items with missing rows or unresolved statuses (fail/violated/unknown). Added RED/GREEN tests for missing review rows, failing rows, and generated acceptance.md artifact evidence. Also formatted files previously reported by Prettier so pnpm run check passes.

tasks.title: Surface workflow readiness blockers through gate tools

metadata.contract_refs_summary: implements AC1 AC5 AC6; verifies AC1 AC5 AC6

tasks.verification: Surfaced workflow readiness blockers through adv_gate_complete and gate state; checkpoint d3f004046fd8177afc30031f643ef45e6227f6a6.
tasks.summary: Added machine-readable readiness_blockers to gate state and GateStuckSignalPayload. Workflow gate readiness now records structured GateReadinessBlocker objects when artifact/contract checks reject a completion signal. adv_gate_complete now waits for the workflow gate result after firing gateCompletedSignal; it returns a blocker response with workflowGateStatus, stuckReason, and readinessBlockers when the workflow marks the gate stuck, and refuses to claim success if completion cannot be confirmed. Added tests for tool-level blocker surfacing and workflow state blocker persistence.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added machine-readable readiness_blockers to gate state and GateStuckSignalPayload. Workflow gate readiness now records structured GateReadinessBlocker objects when artifact/contract checks reject a completion signal. adv_gate_complete now waits for the workflow gate result after firing gateCompletedSignal; it returns a blocker response with workflowGateStatus, stuckReason, and readinessBlockers when the workflow marks the gate stuck, and refuses to claim success if completion cannot be confirmed. Added tests for tool-level blocker surfacing and workflow state blocker persistence.

wisdom.content: Async Temporal signal handlers can apply older signal timestamps after later synchronous handlers. Keep workflow last-activity timestamps monotonic (max existing/new ISO) and poll workflow state in tests/tools when a signal handler awaits activities; `handle.signal()` only confirms signal acceptance, not handler completion.

When a workflow must materialize a derived markdown artifact, keep rendering deterministic and workflow-safe (pure function over ChangeWorkflowState), then perform only the filesystem write/inspection through activities before recording artifact evidence.

When a Temporal signal can be rejected asynchronously by workflow readiness, tool-layer mutation responses must query/poll the post-signal workflow state before reporting success; otherwise the tool can claim a gate is done while the workflow marked it stuck.
